title: Cyclosorus pseudohirsutus
intro: Cyclosorus pseudohirsutus, also known as a type of fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Cyclosorus pseudohirsutus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tonics, which are often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
